projects.name: GFI Outlet Replacement – Lazarette (Davit Charger)
projects.notes: GFI plug in the lazarette that the davit charger is plugged into keeps popping. If not monitored the davit battery runs down. Replace outlet.

projects.name: Flybridge Outlet Cover Replacement
projects.notes: Cover on the outlet on the flybridge (side wall, right of the wheel) is worn out and no longer waterproof. Replace with weatherproof cover.

projects.name: Watermaker – Troubleshoot & Repair
projects.notes:
Watermaker showed higher than normal / higher than okay water temperature on last use. Likely a sensor — troubleshoot and replace sensor or do whatever is necessary to fix.

*Also check FW tank level; FW flushes from watermaker appear to be using too much water.

projects.name: Watermaker Filter Replacement
projects.notes: Replace watermaker filters.

projects.name: Stanadyne – Topped Off Fuel Treatment
projects.notes: Add Stanadyne treatment for topped off fuel.

projects.name: Kabola Furnace Service
projects.notes:
Full furnace service.

a. Flush hydronic loop to get heat into the towel racks in the heads.
b. Engine heat portion of Kabola system not working — blowers run but air is cool. Diagnose and repair.

projects.name: Water Heater – Remove 240V Label
projects.notes: No 240V element in the new water heater. Remove the label so as not to confuse anyone.

projects.name: Tender Service
projects.notes:
Bring tender to gill net crane load to trailer and bring to shop. 
Service outboard
  -Replace engine oil & filter
  -Replace lower gear oil
  -Replace raw water pump Impeller
  -Secondary fuel filter
  -Replace primary fuel filter (fuel water separator) element
  -Grease steering

projects.name: Windlass Service & Inspection
projects.notes:
a. Oil change.
b. Run windlass for functionality.
c. Check brown staining under and inside.

projects.name: Spigots – Function Check & Alignment
projects.notes: Check all spigots for functionality. Clock the one spigot so it sits at a 45-degree angle matching the other one.

projects.name: Steering – Fluid Check
projects.notes: Check steering fluids and pressure in reservoir in lazarette.

projects.name: Thruster Fluid Check
projects.notes: Gain access to thruster. Check thruster fluids reservoir and inspect thruster motor and thruster tube for any abnormalities.

projects.name: Battery Status Check
projects.notes: Assess battery status.

scopeTasks.desc:
-Check voltage of thruster, start, davit batteries
    -Load test the house battery bank from fully charged to 12v.

projects.name: Rust & Scratch Removal on Stainless Steel
projects.notes: Remove rust and stubborn scratch marks from stainless steel throughout vessel.

scopeTasks.desc: Foredeck railings — remove rust and stubborn scratch marks
Portuguese bridge handrailing — remove rust and stubborn scratch marks
Flybridge handrailing — remove rust and stubborn scratch marks
Door hinges — remove rust and stubborn scratch marks
Stainless plate on the bow pulpit beneath the windlass.

projects.name: General Polish/Seal Stainless Steel
projects.notes: General polish on stainless steel throughout vessel.

projects.name: Pilothouse Windows – Exterior Cleaning (Waterspot Removal)
projects.notes: 11 windows total including 2 aft flybridge windows.

scopeTasks.desc: Remove stubborn watermarks and clean interior windows (11 windows incl. 2 aft flybridge)

projects.name: Pilothouse Windows – Aquapel Exterior
projects.notes: 11 windows total including 2 aft flybridge windows.

scopeTasks.desc: Apply Aquapel rain repellent to exterior windows (11 windows incl. 2 aft flybridge)

projects.name: Davit – Base Flange & Inspection
projects.notes: Get estimate for fabricating a stainless flange for the cockpit sole that will secure the post from flexing at the level of the deck and then leaking water down onto the running gear platform in the lazarette.

projects.name: Macerator
projects.notes: Recommend having spare macerator on board. Would you like us to order one?

projects.name: Davit Pre-Season Check
projects.notes: Run davit, check for corrosion and proper function.

projects.name: Replace Start Battery in Tender
projects.notes: The battery was super low and the battery should be replaced. With a new battery installed the charger functionality should be confirmed.

scopeTasks.desc: We found the start battery for the tender at 10v. The battery switch was off and the charger hooked up. I am unsure if it was an outlet not having power or if the plug had been tugged and not providing power to the charger. I wiggled the plug on the outlet when we found the battery dead and then checked the charger light was on. I should have checked the light was on before wiggling the plug in the outlet... We brought a Victron battery charger from the shop and charged the battery to get it sufficient juice to run the outboard over to the crane.
